case_title: EDUART HOXHA VS. MARLENE RIVERA RAMOS

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100176686) FILED BY DEFENDANT RIVERA RAMOS, MARLENE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100179691) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOXHA, EDUART JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT RAMOS' UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE AND REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE IS GRANTED AND DENIED AS FOLLOWS. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO THE FORM INTERROGATORIES. PLAINTIFF HOXHA SHALL SERVE VERIFIED, OBJECTION-FREE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES WITHIN ONE WEEK OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS. THE NOTICE OF MOTION DOES SEEK ANY RELIEF RELATED TO THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $500 ARE AWARDED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT RAMOS AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF HOXHA TO BE PAID WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATANALOTTI, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2023 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories Set One And Requests For Admission Set One Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARLENE RIVERA RAMOS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories Set One And Requests For Admission Set One Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Discovery

Appearances (by Zoom):
Eduart Hoxha Plaintiff in Pro Per.
No other Appearances.

Mr. Hoxha stipulates to the Judge Pre Tem hearing the matter and authorizes the clerk to sign the stipulation on his behalf.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court announces a contest email was not received and there is no appearance by the other side. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant Ramos' unopposed Motion to Compel Form Interrogatories, Set One And Requests For Admission, Set One is GRANTED and DENIED as follows. The Motion is GRANTED as to the Form Interrogatories. Plaintiff Hoxha shall serve verified, objection-free responses to Form Interrogatories within one week of notice of this order. The Motion is DENIED as to the Requests for Admissions. The Notice of Motion does seek any relief related to the Request for Admissions. Sanctions in the amount of $500 are awarded in favor of Defendant Ramos and against Plaintiff Hoxha to be paid within two weeks of notice of this order.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/jpt)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2022 Set For Trial On Aug-07-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
